textByHash.1d3258cfb19f2e06cf922742de91e83891de1dc9: I can't talk now. Can't you see we're trying to win a battle here?
textByHash.1fa58c32c8a3bc0b44e3c3d25137a49b84fdca2e: You can't see me, no one can. Monsters, demons, they're all around me!
textByHash.29e1cbf0cad1a71e9266d0b6aed7a564a9ec962f: More than we, less than our feet.
textByHash.4c9414fa177f28067cb410f823e9efe793870dcc: I can't stand this war. The misery, the pain, it's driving me crazy! When will it end?
textByHash.7870ed9a0f056b1df34f39f4596f38663233d94c: OK? Who's OK? Not me! Hee hee!
textByHash.7a605beeab19495c8b31b91cea8ae5f23b130bed: More than my head, less than my fingers.
textByHash.935834080ff00e930a262ef8162f0770335a453e: Don't talk to me, you can't see me. No one can, just the demons.
textByHash.b77d7df9ec5c532c2e1efea04c0928e286c07ada: My legs and your legs, ha ha ha!
textByHash.b92be25d2354ffecdd84f85d2c14e97c2c1519fc: All day we pray in the hay, hee hee.
textByHash.bc1c5f8167853ffe392f849adc3c4d4092858eb6: I feel dizzy, where am I? Oh dear, oh dear I need some rest.
textByHash.dac03920c6c893edc1061f1cea90f161ae7c7351: Dance with me, and Khazard's men are beat.
textByHash.f396200a5398b328f67921d5cc4b284363652b9d: They're dancing, all of them, hee hee.
